text: Family is not an important thing. It's everything.
author: Michael J. Fox

text: The love of a family is life's greatest blessing.
author: Unknown

text: Family means no one gets left behind or forgotten.
author: David Ogden Stiers

text: Other things may change us, but we start and end with the family.
author: Anthony Brandt

text: In family life, love is the oil that eases friction, the cement that binds closer together, and the music that brings harmony.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

text: The family is one of nature's masterpieces.
author: George Santayana

text: A happy family is but an earlier heaven.
author: George Bernard Shaw

text: Rejoice with your family in the beautiful land of life.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Family is the compass that guides us. They are the inspiration to reach great heights, and our comfort when we occasionally falter.
author: Brad Henry

text: The memories we make with our family is everything.
author: Candace Cameron Bure

text: Family is where life begins and love never ends.
author: Unknown

text: To us, family means putting your arms around each other and being there.
author: Barbara Bush

text: The bond that links your true family is not one of blood, but of respect and joy in each other's life.
author: Richard Bach

text: Family and friends are hidden treasures; seek them and enjoy their riches.
author: Wanda Hope Carter

text: A family is a place where minds come in contact with one another.
author: Buddha

text: The most important thing in the world is family and love.
author: John Wooden

text: Home is where you are loved the most and act the worst.
author: Marjorie Pay Hinckley

text: Family faces are magic mirrors. Looking at people who belong to us, we see the past, present, and future.
author: Gail Lumet Buckley

text: There is no doubt that it is around the family and the home that all the greatest virtues of human society are created, strengthened and maintained.
author: Winston Churchill

text: You don't choose your family. They are God's gift to you, as you are to them.
author: Desmond Tutu

text: Being a family means you are a part of something very wonderful. It means you will love and be loved for the rest of your life.
author: Lisa Weed

text: The family is the first essential cell of human society.
author: Pope John XXIII

text: Call it a clan, call it a network, call it a tribe, call it a family: Whatever you call it, whoever you are, you need one.
author: Jane Howard

text: Happiness is having a large, loving, caring, close-knit family in another city.
author: George Burns

text: In every conceivable manner, the family is link to our past, bridge to our future.
author: Alex Haley

text: Families are the compass that guide us.
author: Unknown

text: A man travels the world over in search of what he needs and returns home to find it.
author: George A. Moore

text: Where there is family, there is love.
author: Unknown

text: Family is a life jacket in the stormy sea of life.
author: J.K. Rowling

text: All happy families are alike; each unhappy family is unhappy in its own way.
author: Leo Tolstoy

text: Sticking with your family is what makes it a family.
author: Mitch Albom

text: Family is family.
author: Linda Linney

text: The strength of a family, like the strength of an army, lies in its loyalty to each other.
author: Mario Puzo

text: When trouble comes, it's your family that supports you.
author: Guy Lafleur

text: Nothing is better than going home to family and eating good food and relaxing.
author: Irina Shayk

text: My family is my strength and my weakness.
author: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan

text: The only rock I know that stays steady, the only institution I know that works, is the family.
author: Lee Iacocca

text: Everyone needs a house to live in, but a supportive family is what builds a home.
author: Anthony Liccione

text: Family is not defined by our genes, it is built and maintained through love.
author: Amalia G.

text: The informality of family life is a blessed condition that allows us all to become our best while looking our worst.
author: Marge Kennedy

text: What can you do to promote world peace? Go home and love your family.
author: Mother Teresa

text: Family is the heart of a home.
author: Unknown

text: Home is the nicest word there is.
author: Laura Ingalls Wilder

text: A house is made of walls and beams; a home is built with love and dreams.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: Having somewhere to go is home. Having someone to love is family. Having both is a blessing.
author: Unknown

text: It didn't matter how big our house was; it mattered that there was love in it.
author: Peter Buffett

text: Blood makes you related. Loyalty makes you family.
author: Unknown

text: Family: where life begins and love never ends, no matter the distance between us.
author: Unknown

text: Some family trees bear an enormous crop of nuts.
author: Wayne Huizenga

text: If you cannot get rid of the family skeleton, you may as well make it dance.
author: George Bernard Shaw

text: Children are the anchors that hold a mother to life.
author: Sophocles

text: A mother's arms are made of tenderness and children sleep soundly in them.
author: Victor Hugo

text: My father gave me the greatest gift anyone could give another person: he believed in me.
author: Jim Valvano

text: There is no friendship, no love, like that of the parent for the child.
author: Henry Ward Beecher

text: To the world you may be one person, but to one person you may be the world.
author: Dr. Seuss

text: A brother is a friend given by nature.
author: Jean Baptiste Legouve

text: Sisters are different flowers from the same garden.
author: Unknown

text: A sister is a gift to the heart, a friend to the spirit, a golden thread to the meaning of life.
author: Isadora James

text: Brothers and sisters are as close as hands and feet.
author: Vietnamese Proverb

text: Grandchildren are the dots that connect the lines from generation to generation.
author: Lois Wyse

text: Grandparents are a family's greatest treasure, the founders of a loving legacy.
author: Unknown

text: It is a wise father that knows his own child.
author: William Shakespeare

text: Motherhood: All love begins and ends there.
author: Robert Browning

text: The heart of a mother is a deep abyss at the bottom of which you will always find forgiveness.
author: Honore de Balzac

text: One of the greatest titles in the world is parent, and one of the biggest blessings in the world is to have parents to call mom and dad.
author: Jim DeMint

text: Every day of my life has been a gift from my parents.
author: Shohreh Aghdashloo

text: Children are not a distraction from more important work. They are the most important work.
author: C.S. Lewis

text: The best inheritance a parent can give his children is a few minutes of his time each day.
author: Orlando Aloysius Battista

text: You leave home to seek your fortune and, when you get it, you go home and share it with your family.
author: Anita Baker

text: The greatest thing in family life is to take a hint when a hint is intended, and not to take a hint when a hint isn't intended.
author: Robert Frost

text: Govern a family as you would cook a small fish, very gently.
author: Chinese Proverb

text: An ounce of blood is worth more than a pound of friendship.
author: Spanish Proverb

text: Families are like fudge, mostly sweet with a few nuts.
author: Unknown

text: Family is like branches on a tree. We all grow in different directions, yet our roots remain as one.
author: Unknown

text: Our family is a circle of strength and love. With every birth and every union, the circle grows.
author: Unknown

text: At the end of the day, a loving family should find everything forgivable.
author: Mark V. Olsen

text: Family isn't always blood. It's the people in your life who want you in theirs; the ones who accept you for who you are.
author: Unknown

text: Nothing can bring a real sense of security into the home except true love.
author: Billy Graham

text: The family is both the fundamental unit of society as well as the root of culture.
author: Michael Novak

text: You can kiss your family and friends good-bye and put miles between you, but at the same time you carry them with you in your heart.
author: Frederick Buechner

text: Cherish your human connections: your relationships with friends and family.
author: Barbara Bush

text: Family life is too intimate to be preserved by the spirit of justice. It can be sustained by a spirit of love which goes beyond justice.
author: Reinhold Niebuhr

text: Peace is the beauty of life. It is sunshine. It is the smile of a child, the love of a mother, the joy of a father, the togetherness of a family.
author: Menachem Begin

text: When everything goes to hell, the people who stand by you without flinching, they are your family.
author: Jim Butcher

text: Family means too much, friends are too valuable, and life is too short to put off sharing with people how much they really mean to you.
author: Unknown

text: A family doesn't need to be perfect; it just needs to be united.
author: Unknown

text: In time of test, family is best.
author: Burmese Proverb

text: Family: a group experience of love and support.
author: Marianne Williamson

text: Everybody wants to be a part of a family. It's what keeps us grounded.
author: Angie Harmon

text: If the family were a fruit, it would be an orange, a circle of sections, held together but separable, each segment distinct.
author: Letty Cottin Pogrebin

text: Home is people. Not a place. If you go back there after the people are gone, then all you can see is what is not there any more.
author: Robin Hobb

text: Ohana means family. Family means nobody gets left behind or forgotten.
author: Chris Sanders

text: Life is beautiful. It's about giving. It's about family.
author: Walt Disney

text: I sustain myself with the love of family.
author: Maya Angelou

text: Pray in your family daily, that yours may be in the number of the families who call upon God.
author: Christopher Love

text: The family is a haven in a heartless world.
author: Christopher Lasch

text: Feelings of worth can flourish only in an atmosphere where individual differences are appreciated, mistakes are tolerated, communication is open, and rules are flexible — the kind of atmosphere that is found in a nurturing family.
author: Virginia Satir

text: Other people's opinion of you does not have to become your reality; your family's love does.
author: Unknown

text: A family in harmony will prosper in everything.
author: Chinese Proverb

text: The love in our family flows strong and deep, leaving us memories to treasure and keep.
author: Unknown
